title: Tarzan and the Huntress
writer: Jerome Gruskin, Rowland Leigh, Edgar Rice Burroughs
actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Brenda Joyce, Johnny Sheffield
plot: To equip the American zoos with as many animals as possible, a cruel trio of big game hunters team up with an unexpected ally, threatening the African fauna. Will Tarzan allow the fiendish huntress to pillage the jungle?
